name: Relatives and Inheritance
description: A character may name one relative to inherit if he disappears a game month, the estate passing at a 10% tax on all goods; the heir starts at his class's lowest level. A returning character repossesses (referee's option on the heir's grace) for another 10% — the heir may stay on as a retainer at loyalty 0 to -6, and may intrigue. The relative-less lose everything.
